title: Casino Club
_palette_note: Casino disk-token pool: brass / copper / silver / gold. On-board collectibles render as flat brass-tone disks (loose casino tokens), not faceted gems.
_mechanic_defaults_note: Keys inherited by every child game manifest under games/. Child manifests override per-key (no removal). Lifted: type/presentation/icon_passthrough_color/bake_icons_into_wedge — all five casino mini-games declare them identically. Casino's rotor sits under a smoked glass cap (recessed cabinet look); flavours that want the open mechanical rotor at the surface override presentation="mechanical" in their own manifest.

mechanic_defaults._well_radius_fraction_note: Casino's rotor is the WHOLE table — 1.665× the outer-circle radius. Other flavours that don't declare this default to the centre-rose marking size (encloses the coin pack).

_mechanics_note: Mini-games are discovered by walking games/*/manifest.json. The GameSetupPage picker surfaces them when there are 2+ entries; the selection persists in GameSettings.ActiveMechanicId.
_payout_note: All values inside payout_patterns are STAKE MULTIPLIERS. The casino wager ledger pays out wager * (1 + award), so award=1 doubles the stake, award=5 pays 6x. award=-1 is the PUSH sentinel (stake refunded, no winnings). award=0 (or missing key) means no match — pattern falls through to the next entry, ultimately forfeiting to the house.
_subflavour_economy_rules: Engine-level (automatic for any rotor sub-game): (1) Whole pocket value V is drained from opposing teams and becomes the entire wager — no immediate split payout to the shooter. (2) On WIN: shooter receives wager refund + bonus drained from same opposing teams proportional to their original contribution. (3) On PUSH (-1): wager refund only. (4) On FORFEIT: opponents already paid, wager stays with house. Sub-game authors MUST: cap multipliers at 5x; use -1 (push) for moderately-common outcomes; forfeit only the most-common outcomes; target RTP 90-95% (house edge 5-10%).
_tutorial_note: Walkthrough step ids — looked up by TutorialStepCatalog.GetById.
_hints_note: Contextual hints fired during play. event = string id the casino runtime emits via HintTracker.NotifyEvent. Text comes from locales' hint.<id> key. Live economy hints (wager, foul, low-chips, etc.) are registered in code by CasinoEconomyHints.cs — this manifest list covers only the engine-emitted shared events.
